name: printerfarm
description: Local, no-root orchestration for stock networked Creality printer farms.

scripts.check: node --check bin/server.mjs && node --check bin/mock-printer.mjs && node --check lib/creality.mjs && node --check lib/discovery.mjs && node --check lib/farm.mjs && node --check lib/probe.mjs && node --check public/app.js
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm test && npm run test:integration
